# HELP eo_expansions_total Expansions performed.
# TYPE eo_expansions_total counter
eo_expansions_total{run_id="run-a"} 51234
# HELP eo_commits_total Nodes committed to the tree.
# TYPE eo_commits_total counter
eo_commits_total{run_id="run-a"} 40110
# HELP eo_duplicates_total Duplicate states discarded.
# TYPE eo_duplicates_total counter
eo_duplicates_total{run_id="run-a"} 11124
# HELP eo_frontier_size Current frontier size.
# TYPE eo_frontier_size gauge
eo_frontier_size{run_id="run-a"} 2048
# HELP eo_best_score Best score seen so far.
# TYPE eo_best_score gauge
eo_best_score{run_id="run-a"} 0.9137
# HELP eo_inflight_jobs Jobs currently in flight.
# TYPE eo_inflight_jobs gauge
eo_inflight_jobs 14
# HELP eo_stall_level Escalation level of the stall detector.
# TYPE eo_stall_level gauge
eo_stall_level{run_id="run-a"} 1
